summary: Notepad++ 3-variant installation modes with bundled settings zip
changes: Three NPP install modes: NPP + Settings (install+settings), NPP Settings (settings-only), Install NPP (install-only)
Mode resolution chain: -Mode param > $env:NPP_MODE > default install+settings
New keywords: npp+settings, npp-settings, install-npp with modes map in install-keywords.json
run.ps1 keyword resolver now reads modes map and sets $env:NPP_MODE per script
Updated help tables and Available Scripts section with NPP variant keywords
